name: The Bargain Gate
descriptionSeed: Horned architecture and scrupulous fairness. The Abyssal Choir names what you want — plainly, in public, without the decency of pretending otherwise — and then offers you exactly that at exactly what it costs. Their bargains are perfectly fair. That is the horror: they will not protect you from the price of your own wanting, and they consider protecting you from it the true cruelty.
encounterFlavor: Choir-brokers who name your appetite in one look; someone paying, correctly, and it is terrible; a bargain being offered to you that you want very badly.
questSeeds: A bargain was fair and a child is paying it
Someone in the Valley has been dealing with the Choir and has not told anyone what they promised
